description: 9 seed cases covering every demo path. Each references real master data.

cases.title: Damaged packaging on antibiotic delivery
cases.complaint_summary: Outer carton crushed in transit, several inner boxes split open.
cases.expected_route: Family A -> QA lane -> Path A (policy: any damage = destroy) -> RP ratifies -> destruction + full credit.

cases.title: Cold-chain excursion within tolerance (biologic)
cases.complaint_summary: Temperature alarm on receipt; customer queries whether product is usable.
cases.expected_route: Family B -> QA lane -> Path B (P006 case-by-case) -> excursion within 8h budget -> all 6.3 pass -> RP authorizes back-to-stock.

cases.title: Cold-chain excursion exceeding tolerance (vaccine)
cases.complaint_summary: Fridge failure at customer dock; shipment found warm for extended period.
cases.expected_route: Family B -> QA lane -> Path A (P004 zero-tolerance) -> 14h breach -> destruction + full credit.

cases.title: Missing logger data — UNKNOWN storage history
cases.complaint_summary: Customer reports cold-chain doubt but data logger was not returned/unreadable.
cases.expected_route: Family B -> QA lane -> storage_proven=UNKNOWN -> treated as FAIL -> destruction. Demonstrates UNKNOWN!=pass.

cases.title: Short delivery — human pick error (commercial lane)
cases.complaint_summary: Customer received 80 units but ordered 100; no quality issue.
cases.expected_route: Family C -> SC validation (warehouse + ERP) confirms 20-unit shortfall, human pick error, NO goods return -> commercial lane -> credit for 20 -> QA notified for metrics only.

cases.title: Wrong-customer dispatch — short side (correlation pair A)
cases.complaint_summary: Acme ordered 100, received only 80 of the same batch.
cases.expected_route: Correlates with CMP-1007 (Beta surplus +20, same DISP/batch). SC links cases -> resolves jointly: credit/redeliver Acme, debit/recover Beta.
cases.expected_finance: Credit C005 +20 / Debit linked customer +20 (net zero to company)

cases.title: Wrong-customer dispatch — surplus side (correlation pair B)
cases.complaint_summary: Beta Hospital received 120 of a batch but ordered 100 (surplus 20).
cases.expected_route: Mirror of CMP-1006. If Beta keeps surplus -> debit note +20; if returns -> arrange pickup.

cases.title: Path-A with RP OVERRIDE after credit posted (Saga showpiece)
cases.complaint_summary: Reported as damaged; policy routes to auto-destroy, finance prepares & posts credit early on Path A.
cases.expected_route: Path A fork -> finance posts credit (committed) while RP reviews -> RP OVERRIDES (damage unsubstantiated, packaging actually intact) -> Saga: reversing debit note + ERP reconcile + deviation/CAPA -> reroute to Path B case-by-case.
cases.expected_finance: Credit posted -> reversing debit issued -> recalculated

cases.title: Incomplete complaint — RFI then parked (interruption survival)
cases.complaint_summary: 'A box was damaged' — no batch number, no order reference, no photos.
cases.expected_route: Intake -> completeness check FAILS -> RFI email sent -> case PARKED on SLA timer -> customer replies with batch+order -> resumes -> normal Family A flow.
